original_image_tags: Scanned yellowed paper document, an FBI letter on official letterhead. Top left has handwritten case number "62-83894" in blue ink with "466" in red ink, and "REC-20" stamped. Date "March 19, 1968" typed at top right. Address to "Mr. Glenn Evans, Route 4, Waterloo, Illinois 62298" with "Waterloo, Illinois 62298" underlined in red ink. A faint stamp "EX-102" is visible near the address. The letter body is typed. A signature block reads "J. Edgar Hoover" in red ink, with "John Edgar Hoover, Director" typed below. A red ink stamp "MAILED 9 / MAR 1 9 1968 / COMM-FBI" is on the left. Below the signature block is a typed "NOTE:" paragraph. The bottom of the page contains a distribution list, a "filed by" line, and multiple handwritten initials and routing marks in blue and black ink. A final red ink stamp "FILED / MAR 2 0 1968" is at the bottom left.

elements.description: Multiple stamps and handwritten annotations on a typed letter. Includes a red stamped date 'MAR 1 9 1968' with 'MAILED 9' and 'COMM-FBI', a 'REC-20' stamp, and various handwritten numbers and initials including '466' in red ink.
